message:
test(feature-gated): expand inline tests for 5 feature-gated modules to 30+ threshold

Batch 2 of ft-3invg: command_handoff (19→30), vendored (22→32),
rollout (20→30), bootstrap (19→31), tui/mod.rs (3→30).

Combined with batch 1 (ftui_compat, keymap, anthropic_auth,
google_auth, output_gate), all 10 feature-gated modules now meet
the 30+ inline test threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
